17320:
Oh, crescent moon up above,
Do you ever question yourself?
29480:
I reach out to you again,
And you share a comforting glow
41250:
Hidden behind the clouds,
Your light softly peeking out
47700: Here I am reaching up to you again
53400: All the things I never said, start to vanish as I
68970: All the thoughts I want to share become a little prayer
75050: Cast into the sky, amidst starlight
81120:
I wish that someday I'll be like you,
And that maybe I could too
88330: Give light to someone else in need
